description: Composition Black t-shirt made of 95% viscose and 5% lycra, has a round neck, long sleeves, printed branding towards the left hem and panel detailing on the hems Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Upgrade your casual look with this black t-shirt from lee. The long slinky sleeves gives an interesting edge to this tee, while the viscose fabric accentuates your curves. Team this tee with skinny jeans, stilettoes and chunky jewellery for a party look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
